'''thotachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iambick|iambick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iambick|iambick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thotachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotachithi|thotachithi]] || [[word:thotachiji|thotachiji]] || [[word:thotachishi|thotachishi]] || [[word:thotachiki|thotachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotachuthuthu|thotachuthuthu]] || [[word:thotachujuju|thotachujuju]] || [[word:thotachushushu|thotachushushu]] || [[word:thotachukuku|thotachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachuthu|thotachuthu]] || [[word:thotachuju|thotachuju]] || [[word:thotachushu|thotachushu]] || [[word:thotachuku|thotachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachufthuf|thotachufthuf]] || [[word:thotachufjuf|thotachufjuf]] || [[word:thotachufshuf|thotachufshuf]] || [[word:thotachufkuf|thotachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotachethe|thotachethe]] || [[word:thotacheje|thotacheje]] || [[word:thotacheshe|thotacheshe]] || [[word:thotacheke|thotacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotachothotho|thotachothotho]] || [[word:thotachojojo|thotachojojo]] || [[word:thotachoshosho|thotachoshosho]] || [[word:thotachokoko|thotachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachotho|thotachotho]] || [[word:thotachojo|thotachojo]] || [[word:thotachosho|thotachosho]] || [[word:thotachoko|thotachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachofthof|thotachofthof]] || [[word:thotachofjof|thotachofjof]] || [[word:thotachofshof|thotachofshof]] || [[word:thotachofkof|thotachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfthĂŻf|thotachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfjĂŻf|thotachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfshĂŻf|thotachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfkĂŻf|thotachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thotachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thotachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thotachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thotachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfthĂŻf|thotachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfjĂŻf|thotachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfshĂŻf|thotachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfkĂŻf|thotachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfthĂŻf|thotachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfjĂŻf|thotachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfshĂŻf|thotachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thotachĂŻfkĂŻf|thotachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotachĂŠthĂŠ|thotachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thotachĂŠjĂŠ|thotachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thotachĂŠshĂŠ|thotachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thotachĂŠkĂŠ|thotachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotachathatha|thotachathatha]] || [[word:thotachajaja|thotachajaja]] || [[word:thotachashasha|thotachashasha]] || [[word:thotachakaka|thotachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachatha|thotachatha]] || [[word:thotachaja|thotachaja]] || [[word:thotachasha|thotachasha]] || [[word:thotachaka|thotachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachafthaf|thotachafthaf]] || [[word:thotachafjaf|thotachafjaf]] || [[word:thotachafshaf|thotachafshaf]] || [[word:thotachafkaf|thotachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thotachasha|thotachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotachshĂ«sha|thotachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotachrosha|thotachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotachmusha|thotachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotachyasha|thotachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotachnkshĂ«sha|gothotachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotachnkrosha|gothotachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotachnkmusha|gothotachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotachnkyasha|gothotachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thotatachasha|thotatachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotatachshĂ«sha|thotatachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotatachrosha|thotatachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotatachmusha|thotatachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotatachyasha|thotatachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotatachnkshĂ«sha|gothotatachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotatachnkrosha|gothotatachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotatachnkmusha|gothotatachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotatachnkyasha|gothotatachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thetĂŠchasha|thetĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thetĂŠchshĂ«sha|thetĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thetĂŠchrosha|thetĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thetĂŠchmusha|thetĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thetĂŠchyasha|thetĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothetĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gothetĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothetĂŠchnkrosha|gothetĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothetĂŠchnkmusha|gothetĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothetĂŠchnkyasha|gothetĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thotfachasha|thotfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotfachshĂ«sha|thotfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotfachrosha|thotfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotfachmusha|thotfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotfachyasha|thotfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotfachnkshĂ«sha|gothotfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotfachnkrosha|gothotfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotfachnkmusha|gothotfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotfachnkyasha|gothotfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
